channel.title: GitHub SMT Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of SMT in GitHub

item.title: cvc5/cvc5
item.description: cvc5 is an open-source automatic theorem prover for Satisfiability Modulo Theories (SMT) problems.

item.title: adafruit/Adafruit_CAD_Parts
item.description: CAD files for various boards, components and parts
